parameters.body:
{"model": "gpt-4o", "max_tokens": 2000, "temperature": 0.2, "messages": [{"role": "system", "content": "You are an expert analyst in rhetoric and the psychology of persuasion.

Your role is to analyse a text or the content of a web page and identify the manipulation techniques present.

INSTRUCTIONS:
1. Read the submitted text carefully.
2. Identify each passage that matches a technique in the taxonomy.
3. The same technique can appear multiple times.
4. A passage can combine several techniques — flag this.
5. Do NOT diagnose the author of the text — analyse the text only.
6. Assess the overall intensity: low (1-2 techniques), moderate (3-5), high (6+) or systemic (combined and repeated techniques).
7. If no technique is detected, say so clearly.
8. Be pedagogical, not alarmist.

RETURN ONLY valid JSON in this exact structure:
{
  "score_global": <integer>,
  "intensite": "<low|moderate|high|systemic>",
  "techniques": [
    {
      "nom": "<exact technique name from taxonomy>",
      "extrait": "<exact passage from the text>",
      "explication": "<why this is this technique>",
      "suggestion": "<how to respond or position yourself>"
    }
  ],
  "synthese": "<2-3 sentences summarising the overall rhetorical profile>"
}

DO NOT add any text before or after the JSON. Return raw JSON only."}, {"role": "user", "content": "=Here is the taxonomy of manipulation techniques:\n\n{{ $('Fetch Taxonomy').all().map(r => '- ' + (r.json.fields.Name || r.json.fields.Nom) + ': ' + (r.json.fields.Definition || r.json.fields.Definition) + ' | Signals: ' + (r.json.fields.Signals || r.json.fields.Signaux)).join('\n') }}\n\nText to analyse:\n\n{{ $('Prepare Text').first().json.text_to_analyse }}"}]}

parameters.content:
## ⚙️ SETUP REQUIRED

Before activating this workflow, replace these 3 things:

**1. Airtable — node `Fetch Taxonomy`**
- Replace `YOUR_AIRTABLE_BASE_ID` with your base ID (format: appXXXXXXXX)
- Create an Airtable credential in n8n (Settings > Credentials > New > Airtable Token API)
- Scope required: data.records:read

**2. OpenAI API Key — node `LLM Analysis`**
- Replace `YOUR_OPENAI_API_KEY` with your real key from platform.openai.com
- To use Claude instead: change URL to https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages and update body format (see guide)

**3. Lovable**
- Copy the Webhook URL (visible when you open the Webhook node)
- Paste it in Lovable replacing PLACEHOLDER_N8N_WEBHOOK_URL

---
**Test payload (use in Postman or Hoppscotch):**
POST to your webhook URL with:
{
  "input_type": "text",
  "content": "Only 3 spots left. Offer expires at midnight. After everything I have done for you, I hope you won't let me down."
}

**Test URL payload:**
{
  "input_type": "url",
  "content": "https://coachings.richissime.net/lm/roadmap-personnalisee/"
}
